title: 7 effective herbal tinctures for smokers with dry throat
description: Ulmus rubra tinctures are made from the inner bark of the American Red Elm tree, which is rich in mucilages, a type of complex carbohydrate that forms a soothing, protective barrier on the mucous membranes. This helps to lock in moisture and calm inflammation in the throat, making it an effective remedy for dry, scratchy throats. The tincture also contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to reduce swelling and fight o...
